rationale: Sales Executive at Infosys with 2.4 years focused on marketing/demand-generation; no ML, IR, or engineering skills relevant to the role — skills are Figma, SEO, and Content Writing.

Business Analyst at fictional company Stark Industries with a marketing/demand-gen background; despite an M.Sc in AI, the only notable technical skill is BentoML and the career shows zero ML engineering or IR work.

HR Manager whose entire career is non-technical roles (HR, Customer Support, Sales, Project Management) across Pied Piper (fictional), Infosys, and Stark Industries (fictional), with no ML or IR engineering work whatsoever.

Marketing Manager with 13 years across fictional companies (Pied Piper, Wayne Enterprises, Hooli) in pure marketing/brand/HR roles; technical skills (BentoML, Databricks) appear decorative with no engineering career evidence.

6.5-year ML engineer with production experience at AI product companies (Wysa, Mad Street Den), Weaviate (advanced, 42 months) and QLoRA skills, XGBoost modeling, and recommendation system work — missing explicit hybrid retrieval / NDCG evaluation ownership but solid applied ML foundation.
Marketing Manager with 4.8 years entirely in marketing/PM/BA roles at Hooli and Pied Piper (both fictional); no ML engineering, retrieval, or IR work despite an M.Sc in AI from COEP Pune.

Marketing Manager / Civil/Mechanical Engineer at fictional companies (Initech, Stark Industries) with no NLP or IR background; Computer Vision skill listed but career history shows zero ML engineering work.

AI Engineer with 5.8 years including production semantic search with sentence-transformers (bge-base) + FAISS at Krutrim, RAG pipeline with Pinecone at Aganitha, expert-level Hugging Face and Sentence Transformers skills, and owns an eval framework for retrieval — closely matches the JD's core requirements.

Software engineer with only 2.4 years of web/API development at fictional company Hooli; Pinecone and Information Retrieval listed as advanced skills but career shows no production ML or retrieval work, only self-learner-level AI exposure.

Business Analyst / Mechanical Engineer across fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Wayne Enterprises, Initech) with no ML, NLP, or IR engineering experience; cloud and Flask skills are entry-level and unrelated to ranking systems.
